channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: BTC Price Down. What's Your Plan? — 60 replies — 240.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC Price Down. What's Your Plan?

Open thread • Replies: 60 • Updated: 2026-07-02 04:30 UTC

OP

BTC is down again, but are you buying the dip or waiting for lower prices?

>Do you think this is just a normal correction, or is there more downside ahead? What's your strategy?

Early replies (first 3)

62426518
I've been shorting this garbage all month

62426527
>>62426518
Wow, you've got good profit by now then?

62426535
>>62426527
up 80% on some 2x short BTC etf

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62431895
>>62426626
depends on which country for sure

62431900
>>62426512
I go in at $100K. Every $20 I spend BTC drops another $1,000.

62431909
My plan is, quite simply, not to own shitcoin

62431916
>>62431909
Like memecoins???!!!

62431991
>>62431888
not possible
>>62431900
Spend every day

62432200
Thoughts on ansem everyone

62433067
>>62426733
Btc is memecoin? Wow

62433595
>>62431991
It's possible. Babylon already supports native BTC staking, if you haven't seen it yet.

62433598
>>62426638
We'll see how it plays out. Good luck either way.

62433616
The elites are finished with Bitcoin. It has served their purpose.

62433621
>>62433616
is bobo based on Shane Gillis? I can't unsee it.

62433746
>>62433595
is this real?

62433751
>>62433616
you know nothing at all

62433844
>>62433598
Back at ya anon. Wishing you much WAGMI

62433854
>>62426512
I'm not retarded so I'm never buying BTC for any price. Being a cryptotard in 2026 is even more pathetic than being a /pmg/tard

62433884
>>62433854
Your lack of retardness coupled with no faith in yourself is why you will never WAGMI

62433961
>>62426512
I don't think about BTC. It was created by centralized exchanges to attack Bitcoin. You're only talking about it because they printed a bunch of tether to get the price to $100k. There are no users, only a small group of poor speculators paying actual USD for this coin. The rest of it is tether iou's.

62434984
>>62433746
Yeah, it's real. Go look into it if you're skeptical. They even have their TBVs in public testnet now.

62434990
>>62433844
Twins?! Who

62434999
>>62433844
Twins?! Who's your bet? Lol

62435029
>>62433961
If there were really no users, I don't think we'd still be seeing institutions, ETFs, and developers building around Bitcoin.

62435427
>>62433884
Why do you like sending beauty women

62437132
>>62432200
It's just another hype

62437198
>>62435029
Are ETFs manipulated?

62437208
>>62434984
What's tbv?

62437216
>>62427317
Money printing obviously

62437422
>>62426512
Continue to troll any and all retards who hold any kind of crypto.

62437563
>>62437208
Basically a way to use native BTC as collateral without wrapping it or handing custody to someone else.

62437565
>>62437198
Every large market gets influenced by big players. The hard part is separating normal market activity from actual manipulation.

62437571
>>62437422
Seems like a waste of energy, but you do you.

item.content:encoded:
WHAT!

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-07-02 04:14 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62432510
>>62432504
greatest grifter of all time. GGOAT

62432514
>>62432504
Bro doesn't even hold his own coin.

62432522

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62432705
>>62432514

62432706
No LINK

62432724

62433151
>>62432514
He still has 75% supply to dump on redcaps.

62433162
>>62432504
Why. Why do people this old have crypto. Why the fuck are people this old still greedy about money what the fucking shit dude

62433168
Any coin trump holds will never be allowed to have mass adoption as a national reserve currency, that’s for sure

62433223
>>62432724

62433224
>>62432504
Was this released today, is it confirmed?

62433620
>>62432724
He needs to be tried for treason and put infront of a firing squad.

62433661
>>62432504
Kek baggot

62433715
>>62433224
Yes

62434050
>>62433224
No

62434060
no

62434084
>>62433162
Do you not see how mammon rules this world? Everyone on this earth worships money either or the economy. Honestly it’s fairly decent evidence that Christianity has at the least gotten a few things correct.

62434139
>>62432724
That's his disclosed holding, he keeps his his xrp on multiple hidden wallets

62434151
>>62432504
>No xrp

62434263
>>62432536
$1.5m between 5 projects is basically dust to him

62434362
funny that he is killing crypto too lmao, crytocucks literally elected this pedo to moon their shitcoins and all that he's done is crash the entire market while enriching himself hahaha

62434367
>>62433224
Maybe

62434424
That's the equivalent of me having like £300 in crypto, money you don't really give a fuck about.

62434435
>>62433224
Mayhaps

62434837
>>62434362
Guess he is a savvy business man

62434938
>>62434362
You lost tra-ACK

62435050
Woah so many zeros such big number woah very awe

Just ignore the fact its 5% of his networth.

Im not looking for to biz being unusable in the run up to the midterms

62435645
>>62434084
>mammon?
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sXw6P3uIpWE

62436877
>>62432724
To be fair he’s probably wary of pumping the bags of a project that donated to democrats.

62436919
>>62432504
Shit like this is why the Clarity Act won't pass. Dems see this and will autistically screech about anything deemed positive for crypto.

62436951
>>62432504
8 years ago on /biz/ never expected the POTUS to be a linkmarine. Lmao

62437017
>>62436919
and they wouldn't be wrong, practically every cryptoshitter in this industry tripped over their own dick to help this happen. they thought they would get the clarity act in exchange, but in true favstian fashion, they've been betrayed after betraying all of their principles

62437537
This is a generational top signal.

item.title: Trump fucked you — 25 replies — 100.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Trump fucked you

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-07-02 04:30 UTC

OP

>His annual disclosure for 2025 with the US Office of Government Ethics, disclosed that Trump made $636 million in royalties from CIC Digital, LLC, a company that issues $TRUMP, a crypto token that he launched three days before taking office for his second term. Almost all of the come came in the form of royalties from a license agreement with Celebration Coins. Trump's meme coin reached its peak value of $74.24 within a day of launching. On Tuesday evening, its price was $1.67, down 98% since inception.

>The president also reported almost $600 million in income from token sales by World Liberty Financial, a cryptocurrency company backed by the president and his family, and around $65 million from equity sales in the firm that controls World Liberty Financial. Another $196 million in equity sales of Stablecoin Holdco LLC are also listed. A crypto firm and issuer of tokens, World Liberty Financial was launched during the 2024 presidential campaign. It was co-founded by the president, his sons Eric and Donald Jr. and Zack and Alex Witkoff, the sons of U.S. special envoy and longtime Trump friend Steve Witkoff.

Eternal aristocratic levels of wealth were transferred from plebs directly to Trump's family via shitcoin scams.

Early replies (first 3)

62433591
>>62433580
>Zack and Alex Witkoff, the sons of U.S. special envoy and longtime Trump friend Steve Witkoff.
I recently learned what background this family has. I was naive to think Witkoff wasnt.....
>>>62433555

62433599
>>62433580
>>62433591
Imagine his sons short when he is cooperating with the cz cartel 1 minute before his retarded tweets and cex dumps! Its just the top of the (((berg)))

62433604
>>62433599
But you know something something in the casino.....

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62433618
>>62433580
LMAO CRYPTO KEKS FUCKED IN THE ASS ONCE AGAIN
HOW MANY UNLUBED COCKS HAVE YOU TAKEN IN YOUR ASS NOW?
FOUR... FIVE HUNDRED? MAYBE SIX HUNDRED?
GET RAPED IN YOUR SAGGY BUTTHOLE CRYPTO KEKS

62433624
>>62433618
If you missed out in the past you can still buy in around 55k(u wont)

62433629
>>62433618
Only the most retarded of retards bought and holded TRUMP coin after the first day.

62433632
>>62433629
on any day.

62433672
>>62433632
I STILL mad i did not buy at the first hours, i saw some /biz/ thread but it wasnt clear that it was real and i was tried. Would have been at fucking 5 Dollar. I of course would have aggressively sold the way up and dumped all at lower then 50. Would have made so much money. So no, people buying at the first day to dump high were not dumb.

62433743
>>62433672
You would have bought at $7 and sold at $2.58.
Trumpenberg would be thankful for your contribution (he wouldn't be).

62433763
>>62433580
So the crypto president and his retarded sons finally killed crypto for good. They should probably shutdown WLFI and their mining and treasury companies at this point. Nobody will ever invest with this scumbags again

62433764
>>62433599
I look forward to the years-long imbroglio of the next administration investigating all of their financial crimes

62433798
>>62433763
Ohboi, are you new to this planet? The 30iq hillbilly niggers ll never learn,

62433862
He had 6b when he entered office, these numbers are nothing, would have made more holding spy

62433864
>>62433580
Nobody cares, amerigolems will defend this no matter how bad the corruption and decay gets because they get to pretend they're winning the (((culture war))) that the yids manufactured to win no matter what.

62433948
>>62433864
Name 1 eu politician less corrupt than trump

62433962
>>62433580
Yeah it’s disgusting I definitely regret voting for him in some ways. And even though I didn’t actually buy any of his shitcoins, I still paid for it because it sucked all the liquidity up and then he dumped on everyone, cratering the entire market and single handedly wrecking the bull run. Then he wrecked it again with tariffs. Then he wrecked it again with the Iran war. I don’t think I’ll be voting again. Fuck the government.

62433974
>>62433618
After you hit the wall, unlubed cock inside you doesn’t even make you cry out loud.

62435237
>>62433618
>>62433974
these are strangely visceral and unnecessarily erotic posts. are you anons speaking from experience????? never bought these coins btw, just don't get why anons are speaking like this

62435296
>>62433580
I voted for this

62436883
you lost tranny

62436896
/biz/ fucked me not trump
I've had several winning plays the last 18 months and each time I was fudded out by retards on this board
It made me realize I can't listen to you morons because you have no clue what is going on.

62436905
>>62433672
It was fucking listed on solana, I don't use solana. Sucks.

62436906
>>62433580
yeah but it has nothing to do with the market performance of crypto. trump family crypto holdings are taking open market losses just like every other bagholder here. this is the classic trump play of royalty & licensing.

62437518
>>62433580
How are his cultists spinning this?

62437570
>>62436896
Most of the posters here are penniless 3rd world browns giving bad advice on purpose because they think it's funny.

item.title: LET'S FUCKING GOOOO — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
LET'S FUCKING GOOOO

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-07-02 04:30 UTC

OP

LET'S FUCKING GOOOO

Early replies (first 3)

62435458
gz

62435459
>>62435387
fake email

62435472
>>62435387
>>62435458
>>62435459
Sir please kindly, have you resolved the issue sir?

What you need is a blockchain expert that can help you retrieve the funds sir.

Have you heard about Mis Petunia Rose Tulips? She has helped me turn my 0.3 BTC into 2.8 BTC. She has been a blessing to me and my family.

Do you have t3l.eg.r4m sir? Please kindly do the needful and install Teamviewer to help her assist you sir.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62435480
>>62435472
Wow <i'm surprised someone else here also knows miss Petunia Rose Tulips. I started with only $5000 and she has turned it into $17000 overnight. It really works!

62435533
>>62435480
I cant believe how good it worked. I only needed to connect the bot to my wallet and within days she made me so much money.

62436108
>>62435387
My portfolio breached 200k today.

62436129
>>62436108
>Screeching fuddie noises

62436130
>>62435472
>t3l.eg.r4m
is that word filtered?
telegram

62436143
>>62435472
Woah 9x roi, your village must be proud of you saar. I had a similar experience but she told me to smear cow dung across my face or else the trades would not go through, was this your experience too?

62436163
>>62435472
Profitable trading requires experience, a solid strategy, and preparation, which we lack. Understanding buy/sell ratios, identifying market leaders, and diversifying are key to reducing risk.
I've Been following miss Petunia Rose Tulips for a while now, and what stand out is how clearly she explains investing. No hype, no pressure-just real guidance that helps people think long term and make a smarter decisions.

62436564
>>62436130
The exchange jews do not want buyers/sellers to P2P via the chat/PMs on their platforms since it would bypass their fees, so they filter word any contact infos and channels.

62437240
>>62435533
Sir I recommend Mr. Johnson on WhatsApp thanks to his trading algorithms my family making $11550 per week passively.

62437245
>>62437240
Who is this mr. Johnson on WhatsApp? I am very interest i think I will contact him and start my financial success..

62437253
>>62437245
Yes I can safely assure you dear. Mr. Johnson is highly successful trader he has made my dreams come true financially. He is legit

62437328
>>62437240
>>62437245
>>62437253
does this faggot indian not know about ids or is it just a bot?

62437351
>>62437328
newfag

62437483
>>62437351
poorfag

62437566
>>62437483
fag

62437572
>>62437253
Mr. Jhonson "White Man" Smith is always giving the bullish cryptocurrency advices

item.title: Anyone else stacking cardboard? It's the smartest play you can be making right now - the prices are crazy, like BAYC 5 y… — 37 replies — 21.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else stacking cardboard? It's the smartest play you can be making right now - the prices are crazy, like BAYC 5 y…

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-07-02 02:48 UTC

OP

Anyone else stacking cardboard? It's the smartest play you can be making right now - the prices are crazy, like BAYC 5 years ago, except cardboard is actually going to continue to moon forever.

Early replies (first 3)

62428300
People said this about comic books in the 60s, 70s, and 80s, and then it all came crashing down in the 90s. Modern aesthetics don't age well.

62428317
>>62428300
Cards have something that comics, Beanie Babies, and Pez dispensers didn't have: modern social media to peddle unlicensed financial advice.

62428336
>>62428288
classic bubble

as soon as boomers die and younger generations get kicked out of the house you're going to see this stuff crash real quick

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62428358
>>62428348
>trading cards have been around since the 1880's,
this is true, but the vast majority of 1880's trading cards are still worthless.

62428360
>>62428288
I like some of the old designs and those cards are common & cheap. Not paying more than $2 for a piece of 20 year old cardboard but good luck to those who do.

62428379
>>62428288
I remember when entire binders of this set (fireworks holo ony) were being sold for about $300. I thought that, if I waited, I would find it at a lower price. No way am I going to spend hundreds of thousands for the same thing. There needs to be someone willing to print replicas of this exact holo pattern, but with quality card backing. I personally missed out, I started collecting around Skyridge. Then, the tcg pretty much died out here.

62428388
>>62428358
>>62428357
Trading cards didn't become great until the 1952 Topp's baseball set, up until then 1880's-1951 they didn't even try with the cards
One of the main reasons Pokemon TCG blew up a few years ago was the introduction of IR and SIR's, full art rares. Pokemon finally started making the cards into actual art-work and people loved it, it will only continue to grow.
One Piece TCG also blew up for same reason, their rare's are beautiful to look at irl, the top tier cards shine like it has jewels imbedded, and the artwork is amazing.
It is not a fad or anything, they actually started caring about the artwork and people responded, just like baseball cards blew up in 1952 when they started trying

62428427
>>62428388
what what a post

its a bubble everyone trading cards will collapase within 365 days sell ur shit close ur shops it's time to move on

62428431
>>62428348
Not buying your basedllennial bags, poketard.

62428441
>>62428431
>>62428427
COME SEE MY CARDS

62428462
>>62428388
>up until then 1880's-1951 they didn't even try with the cards
this is perhaps one of the dumbest takes I've read on the topic ever.

But then I actively collect and sell 1800's trading cards so I'm a bit biased.

62428468
>>62428462
you're right, I was exaggerating, I don't know much about old baseball cards
Is it a good time to buy 1800's cards? They seem really cheap, most of them are 50-100 dollars from what I see

62428635
>>62428468
most 1800's cards aren't sports cards

but no, I don't expect them to go up in value much after this long. Not because they're ugly or low effort, but because almost nobody collects them.

62428679
buy vintage cards. psa 9s and ungraded.

62429112
>>62428635
>but no, I don't expect them to go up in value much after this long.

Not necessarily. All trading cards were worthless for the first century of their existence. The people who were babies when trading cards were invented were dead by the time they started becoming valuable. So cards from the 1880s could absolutely moon.

62429122
>>62428300
but comic books are gay and cards (of basically any type) are inherently cool

62429151
>>62429122
People thought the exact opposite 40 years ago. You are unlikely to do well long-term with art and entertainment as a store of value unless it translates really well across eras and cultures.

62429383
the entire pokemon market was pumped beyond belief and had unique reasons to be worth lots of money

62429525
Would unironically be a better play to just buy sealed booster packs and leave them in your garage for 20 years.

62429966
>>62428288
unironically got into it coz of that zard tard who posts in /biz/ every day

62432323
In the 2021 bull run I roundtripped like a dummy but the one smart thing I did was buy pokemon with some of my bags.

I bought the card in that pic for not much money. It’s HP condition so it won’t get a 10 (most Legendary Collection reverse Holos won’t, they’re notorious for being easily damaged) but the 1st edition Sabrina’s Gengar is pretty damn good condition, LP at worst. I paid $175 for that one and I paid $120 for the Psyduck Scream promo. Both are worth four figures now.

62432473
>>62428288
He borted cardboard ?

62434436
>>62428288
Why does everyone refer to card pumping as "the hobby"? Feels like one of those "we know what we're doing is evil as shit so we're gonna use a euphemism" situations. Like how mafia orgs refer ti themselves as "the family business".

62434462
>>62428288
How do I literally invest in cardboard? Plastic packaging is going to get banned hard.

62434494
>>62434462
Buy, throw it in a closet for 5 years, then sell. It's the most autopilot asset with exponential growth potential in the world.

62434659
Real $

62434682
>>62434659
>5k for some gay dude farting

62434739
>>62434682
Literal Olympians hit this pose when they win. You wouldn't know anything about this, as a chud loser

62435313
zoomzooms and millennifags are kinda like gen-z and boomers with real estate when it comes to modern collectibles. They can only remember line going up and have not learned from historical trends.
All modern collectibles are junk and a cash grab. Pokelimans, magik the gardening are printed in insane number like the 90s wax era, there is a ton of that stuff stored away and once a downturn in the economy or the consumer base reaches a certain age and lose interest the market will become saturated with stuff that nobody wants because at the end of the day these things have no real value. You can't create anything with it apart from fire.

62435396
>>62428635
>but no, I don't expect them to go up in value much after this long. Not because they're ugly or low effort, but because almost nobody collects them.
There has to be hype and people have to know about them. They need to be reminded they exist for them to be sought after and thus a buyers market. It is fascinating really when you have been in the business for a while and you come across something really rare, special or even unique. It may be cool AF and completely unobtainable yet nobody wants to pay anything for it because there is absolutely nobody that knows anything about it. For instance a while back I had a sealed triple AAA big box PC game from the late 90s which had extra goodies such as the soundtrack on a separate CD recorded by the Moscow symphony orchestra which in itself is probably ultra rare, but in the end I did not get much for it because nobody had seen the damn product, it wasn't even registered on the net and certainly not on the price checking platforms.

62435429
>>62434494
I did a similar strat with silver bullion coins a while back. I ignored the general consensus about "getting the cheapest generic silver possible" which means Christmas bars from 1977 and went for current year semi-numismatic coins that have lower mintage numbers, but cost a couple of bucks extra. Series that change design every year so that they have a broader appeal to collectors. Some of them did quite well and I was able to increase my stack because of said strategy lowering my cost of silver substantially.

62437300
>>62434639
Kekked. The elites invest in prices less art and collectibles, they dont care about fungible shiny rocks

item.title: SHORT GAMESTOP — 7 replies — 13.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
SHORT GAMESTOP

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-07-02 04:03 UTC

OP

https://blog.playstation.com/2026/07/01/physical-disc-production-ending-in-january-2028-for-new-games-releasing-on-playstation-consoles/

Early replies (first 3)

62433979
You will own nothing and you will be happy

62433994
>>62433979
discs are kind of stupid anyway
as games get bigger they will not be able to fit onto discs anymore.
Storage tech will become cheap enough over time that everything will be a digital download

62434357
>>62433976
Gamestop is more of a toy store than a video game store these days

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62434381
>>62433976
>Please retail, short the shit out of GameStop right before total return swaps expire and the eBay deal goes through. Slam dunk.

62434723
>>62433994
There are DVDs that can store 1 terabyte. Not bluerays, dvds

62435108
>>62433994
> retarded brainlet take from a retard who doesn't like owning anything and likes to pay for the same shit for 10 years.

opinion discarded.

62437519
>>62433976
gamestop announced that they will open a cracker/packer firm and will provide physical versions of popular games
gamestop will rename to gameshare

item.title: Top crypto trader in US, what TA skills did he use? — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Top crypto trader in US, what TA skills did he use?

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-07-02 04:33 UTC

OP

Top crypto trader in US, what TA skills did he use?

https://x.com/i/status/2072425724699398481

Early replies (first 3)

62437546
Announce war with iran thurs evening, have eric open shorts before hand, announce peace sunday evening, have eric open longs before hand, rinse and repeat. Simple as. No crying in the casino.

62437574
>trump was the dumper behind mcd coin in '17

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: High IQ thread — 28 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
High IQ thread

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-07-02 01:03 UTC

OP

What's the point of "making it"™ when sex doesn't even feel that good? Think about it. When was the last time you got addicted to pussy like it was heroin? Probably never. The idea seems interesting in your head, but when you're actually having sex, you just want it to end it and go home already. Post-nut clarity confirms that society lied to you that sex being the ultimate pleasure and you fell for it. You probably stumble over the same rock again and again for years until you realize the truth eventually. So, why make millions to have more opportunities for something like...sex? Millions are not going to cure your autism, misogyny or social anhedonia anyways

Early replies (first 3)

62434090
>>62434057
It will solve the wagie and Lambo problems though, which are the only problems I care about. I’d also like to live in a nice house on the lake and ride jet skis all summer.

62434105
>only cares about making it for muh sex
Sex obsession is a massive sign of being low IQ

62434165
>>62434090
Why even own a Lambo? It's an overpriced vehicle made by (((Italians))) you probably won't use more than once or twice a month. Once you make it you will not have a job or nowhere to go, really. And all for what? So you can flex your wealth to some negros and normalfags? You can't ride a car like that without exposing yourself as a target for thieves/murderers/golddiggers. Think about the costs: manteinance, insurance, taxes. It's a lot of money down the drain. Same goes for the jet ski. You say you'll ride it all summer but it will likely be gathering dust for most of the year. It will be a constant headache. You'll need to hire people to clean it, fix whatever problems arise, you need a place to store those toys, more and more dust and cleaning. Unless you're a 80 IQ retard I don't see anyone riding a jet ski for more than a day

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62434174
>>62434165
You may be right about the Lambo but you’re wrong about the jet skis I NEED A JET SKI AND I WOULD RIDE IT EVERY DAY AND BANG UR MOM ON IT EVERY NIGHT

62434190
>>62434174
If you make it you can have my sister too, mr jet ski

62434200
The chase of getting a woman to have sex with you is more interesting than the sex itself

62434232
>>62434057
Because the sex isn’t with a woman who has genuine burning desire for you within the bounds of holy matrimony.

62434234
>>62434200
>the chase
You mean talking to a woman? Holy fuck have you ever actually done this? They have no interest in the deep matters of life such as existence, meaning, or spiritual truths. They want to talk about celebrities, gossip, and tv shows. I hate women.

62434249
>>62434234
>I hate women.
you should try men then, fag.

62434322
>>62434232
>muh attraction muh sex in marriage
Women are brainwashed to experience sex as the ultimate pleasure as well. In reality, women are like beautiful and pure temples that feel they want to be desecrated. Except this temple will do everything in its power to make your cock hard so you desecrate it. Therefore the rape fantasies. Nymphos don't necessarily enjoy sex either. Most of them were just molested when they were children/early teens and they seek validation from men by being submissive and slutty. That's it. Sex make women feel guilty in the end. Plus, unless you're chad, no woman will ever feel sexual magnetism for you.
t. I look like quasimodo, its a hard life folks... don't give up, though

62434326
>>62434249
Coomerbrain simp faggot
Wish I could curb stomp your bitch ass

62434332
>>62434057
Making it has nothing to do with sex, idk where you're getting that from. I want to be able to live comfortable, in a comfortable home, not have to wageslave while being able to afford heating cooling, a premium bed, good food, etc.

62434333
Sex without love is useless. Especially if you are female. Guys post sexual revolution are just now finding this out? Must be all the fat chicks nowadays. Yeash! That is what it took. An obesity epidemic. Just date a fat sow and go for long walks to slim her down before having sex. If you fall in love while and if she loses weight then it will be better. If she is not willing to keep up dump her. This should be the male test for a woman. Beats straight up paying a fat hooker.

By the way I did this to some new fat female friends. Not to be mean but because I know obesity a social contagion as well a personal problem. This is a good personality test. If they want to keep up with you with positive encouragement then they have good character. If they try to drag you down into their habits then they have a bad character. Even just for non sexual friendship fat people will do either.

62434420
>>62434057
Buy expensive gift for the whore since sex doesn’t even worth it. Then the whore gold digger would goes on into dating site to look for more “look for right person to start the relationship again”

62434443
>>62434420
Thanks for your valuable input, Sandeep. Your English is almost getting to a second grade level now!

62434450
>>62434165
A nice watch will always make you feel fucking great.

Judicious cosmetic surgery is the same. Don't go beyond what's natural, but nothing gives more happiness per dollar spend than a nosejob if your nose is shit or a hair transplant if you have a bald spot. Keep your expectations realistic of course.

62434536
>>62434332
Most people in this filipino board want money so they can have more opportunities to have sex. I just wanted to point out to these people that it's stupid to "make it" so you can have tons of sex when it's not even that addictive (think fentanyl levels of addiction), but what do I know, I'm a schizoid who doesn't feel pleasure from anything and maybe sex is a subjective experience. But we all know what post-nut clarity is so there must be some echo of reason in what i'm saying.
>>62434450
I'm 40 autistic neet that did a shitton of psychedelics. Believe me, a watch means nothing to me. I cut my own hair, dress like a modern day jester, use different socks in my feet. All is vanity, my friend. Chasing the wind

62434702
I just don't want to turn up to work and spend my day getting my soul drained before collapsing on the bed afterwards and doing it all over again the next day.
Simple as.
I've never had a gf and never will so I don't care about any of that stuff.

62434844
>>62434536
I don't really get post nut clarity after sex the same way I do after masturbation. If it is a fulfilling act I just feel satisfied, if it's a degenerate orgasm I feel shame and get post nut clarity. Sex is not all the same either

62434890
>>62434322
You don’t know what you’re talking about unfortunately due to your sub 5 status.

62435009
>>62434057
Strong disagree, but I'm a high t alpha male on a board full of low t socially awkward betas. Going raw with a woman you find attractive and cumming deep in her pussy is the best feeling in the world, period.

62435044
>>62434165
>.webm
DalitChads keep winning (he only got like 2,000 rupees for that 2010 phone, but at least he's gonna eat for a week?).

62435055
>>62435009
lol high "t" males are sad as fuck, imagine being ultimately defined and proud of being at the mercy of some chemical in your body. It's not different from having an extra chromosome and brag about of it, anyways do a 360 and go be a high t alpha faggot somewhere else, this is a low t socially awkward filipino forum, friend

62435410
>>62434057
Inesse the Russian Jewess and Urzsula the Polish gymnast both had magic pussies. I have fucked ~50 women and only these two had memorable vaginas. They're rare and valuable.

62435419
>>62435410
Petite (under 5 foot 5, ~165 cm) Slavic women have the best vaginas. Amazing. I used to nut in the jewess 6 times a night. The Polish chick had a more kino and clean pussy tho, and she made me cum fast even wearing a condom. She had the absolute top vagina. Picture perfect. Clean. Pink. Beautiful. Tight. Slick.
She also orgasmed almost immediately upon insertion and then constantly while fucking.

62435444
>>62434057
> So, why make millions to have more opportunities for something like...sex? Millions are not going to cure your autism, misogyny or social anhedonia anyways
Money is the only thing that makes life of an autist comfortable, calm, stress free, and gives him the time he wants to spin his thoughts and day any way he wants. Also, it's power. What male doesn't like the feel of some sort of power?

62435483
>>62434057
>When was the last time you got addicted to pussy like it was heroin?
Right now.

62436949
Wait gentlemen, if you are in the Eu, it all does not matter. Let them physically submit you brainwashed idiots. After that it will be over. Islam party, and then its over. You can in the meantime celebrate leftism and all that.

item.title: Why is waging in the USA so fucking horrible and hasn't changed for the better — 6 replies — 6.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why is waging in the USA so fucking horrible and hasn't changed for the better

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-07-02 03:41 UTC

OP

Why is waging in the USA so fucking horrible and hasn't changed for the better

Early replies (first 3)

62437419
>>62437413
its hell the only thing i cared about in my entire shit life was soccer and now that ref cams are out and i can see how these games play its made me so suicidal no joke

if my parents put me in proper coaching i could at least make MLS, my childhood friend i played with made MLS during college.

62437441
>>62437419
Why cams?

62437446
>>62437441
the referee cam where u can actually see how the game is played second by second live

the energy on the field is unreal

https://www.tiktok.com/@xcslaiii/video/7655040279187180813?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7550442659232581134

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62437452
everything fucking sucks unless you're well connected and even then you basically have to exist through mother may I proxy since you rely on others to do anything

62437457
>>62437413
My actual job I find okay, problem is having some faggot calling you and questioning you, who’s not even really better than you at the job just has a bit more seniority and played politics a bit more. It makes zero sense and the boss is a dumbass for letting these eggheads have any control. But yes it’s the price we pay for not taking studies seriously in school.

62437466
post like these make me thankful i quit my job and became a stay at home do nothing.
i dont go outside anymore becuase every time i get black pilled.

item.title: Have you capitulated on Chainlink yet or are you holding to 0? — 14 replies — 5.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Have you capitulated on Chainlink yet or are you holding to 0?

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-07-02 02:06 UTC

OP

Have you capitulated on Chainlink yet or are you holding to 0? If it's not obvious by now, LINK isn't used or needed for anything, and doesn't give you any sort of stake in the Chainlink company. It's effectively a meme coin with an illusion of "fundamentals".

Early replies (first 3)

62433176
>>62433164
Yes I’m the last stink marine on /biz/ that’s held out and I finally capitulated. You can tell big serg he can let it rip now.

62433183
>>62433164
Don't care not selling

62433185
>>62433164
Just sold everything. Good job anon, this was the post that finally did it. Congratulations.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62433307
>>62433164
Arsh goyal saaar pls, you can shit out 4000 of your erc20 scamtoken daily, nobody is buying your 65% team funding bags!

62433436
>>62433164
we are the cuckold marines
and we're NEVER selling

62433437
>>62433436
TRVE!!

62433455
>>62433185
Kek

62433461
>>62433307
A linkie acting like someone calling it out is a thirdworld scammer is an unfathomable level of projection.

62433700
>>62433164
I actually told myself at the start of 2025 that I would sell at the end of 2026 if it hadn't mooned yet.
So you have 6 months, peelers.

62433709
>>62433164
i sold

62435604
Adem won. Total gooner victory

62436081
>>62435604
DO NOT UNDERESTIMATE THE POWER OF ABSOLUTE GOONING

62437170
holding to $0, probably next peak will be $12 before total obliteration

CLL will survive and thrive, but token baggies are now obsolete

item.title: VOO and Chill — 177 replies — 29.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 177 • Updated: 2026-07-01 22:36 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62426144
If I'm just starting out with this stuff, what's wrong with 70% VTI / 30% VXUS?

62426154
Honestly I’m seeing a lot of upside to going into QQQ over VOO as long as you are okay with the fact it is more volatile
The upside it’s just so huge when compounded

62426173
>>62426154
Or honestly, as someone already in VOO, I wonder if it makes sense to just go into something like VGT which has consistently beaten VOO and QQQ (for now anyway) or something like DRAM
A lot of VGTs holdings are currently down but it’s YTD is higher

62426183
>>62407078
I keep half of my funds in VTWAX, rebalancing annually. Right now I'm down 0.84% this year, my portfolio is fucked but VTWAX is my safety net.

62427417
I am also curious about DRAM can anyone tell me if it’s a good hold for a short while

62428031
jfc DRAM (ie a thematic ETF) is bullshit made for retard retail investors that get their financial advice from grifters off of tiktok. this happens every time a finance topic hits the news and every time people get burned.
barely worth saying. if you're unironically taking advice from /biz/ you're already doomed intellectually.

62428054
>>62428031
but why exactly, what reason is there to believe the companies within it won't continue to turn a profit for the foreseeable future?

62428080
>>62428031
>>62428054
Like I'm serious, what exactly is wrong about holding it and selling once memory cools down, is it smarter to just go into a more volatile ETF that at least has a longer history if you want more returns, is it just hype and not really the next big thing, explain why

62428238
>>62428080
this is basic finance 101, there are plenty of resources online or off that will explain it to you.
ignorance isn't even the issue here, your reaction to not knowing something is to have random retards on a thinly veiled gambling board tell you what to think. and don't just jump on another grifter selling a course or ask some AI slop engine and ask it leading questions like "why is investing in DRAM a good idea?".

62428337
>>62428238
In other words you don't know

62429683
>>62400493
Anon there is nothing wrong with doing VOO and chill if you have time and principal
Going into wildly volatile ETFs can be okay if it’s a satellite account
Just be careful of FOMO and not being risk averse
You sound like you have a good head on your shoulders though
Remember this is money, real money, your money

62430693
VOO anons where you at?

62430902
>>62400493
Contrarian nerds always lose.
Always.
In middle school dating.
Being high school incels.
In college.
At work.
In love.
At investing.
At all times.
Follow the crowd and try to fit in. Everyone doing anything else is a reject loser.

62431131
>>62430902
Who is being the contrarian here though

62431374
VOO is managed by 2 girl bosses, Michelle Louie & Aurélie Denis. So with your 0.03% management fee you're essentially paying for those do-nothing "day in the life of a portfolio manager" videos for daughters of elite sociopaths.

62431402
>>62431374
A small price to pay for a low expense ratio

62431920
>>62431131
Anyone trying to beat VOO over decades.

62431922
>>62431920
Feel like VUG has consistently beaten VOO though

62431971
>>62431922
Contrarian.
I own VUG and don't own VOO tho :)

62432023
>>62431920
fair enough
thoughts on a younger person doing QQQM?

62434054
Anyone have thoughts or realized returns and experiences on VOO + satellite
accounts instead of just VOO

62435372
Was gonna try to go into this DRAM dip but decided to just do more VOO
But idk a higher return ETF still sounds promising and like a no brainer whether it’s SOXX or QQQM but QQQ has so much crossover with VOO it’s just redundant and only good for growth seasons
I guess this is why VOO and Chill exists to just stop thinking

62436303
>>62431920
What about QQQ though

62436357
i boughted my daily VOO
i'll keep dealing the real world like a good goyim in the mean time.

62436478
>>62436357
huzzah brother

62436499
>>62400493
Where my VGT bros at?

62436507
>>62400636
>Yes and I'm sure that used car and maybe a holiday you can buy with it when you're 65 from cashing out all your investments will be great.....
You say this as if the average /biz/ shitcoin gambler is performing better than VOO which is definitely not the case.

62436510
>>62428031
Your IQ is so actually low. Holy shit.

62436538
>>62436510
Do you think DRAM has value, honest question, and for how long - if so, what dip should one wait for
>>62436499
VGT and QQQ are only doing better thanks to tech having such strong performances for years now, correct?
VOO seems safe since you don't know the future, but on the other hand, thinking the future of the market for the next decades wont always be tech focused seems so short sighted it's silly.....maybe I should start DCA into VGT?

62436562
>>62400493
>VOO
it's EVOO for me lads

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 195 replies — 27.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 195 • Updated: 2026-07-01 21:25 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62419390
go all in hbar when it bottoms at 0.03

62419964
Bump, just woke up, let's get started

62420874
It would appear that everyone is talking about the new WENDYs Stock

Naturally we should take some time to consider this potential moonshot. Could be a waste of time. In a few I will post information I find relevant to the stock and whether investing is the right option

62422903
Another page 9 bump

62423064
Good to see the thread is still going strong. Today is my off day, let's look into the next subject "predictive programming"

We'll start with Oliver tree

62425537
op was not a fag this thread has good vibes we should keep it going until we all make it
personally im trading perps with a system after 10 years of learning charts off/on but finally committing
did a 32x in 2021 and should have been able to retire but didnt anticipate the biden years so here we are going pure psycho mode like we did back then but even harder until money is /solved/, then I'll keep trading for the love of the game cuz it's the best sport in the world

62425849
>>62423064
This shit is way too schizo. No anon you can not predict the future. You can maybe foresee some type of market trends, seasonality or whatever but this is just ridiculous

62425890
>>62425537
Got any good tips/ressources on learning to trade charts? trying to get into it too

62427228
>>62425849
I concede. I'll look for a more productive venture but I won't let the thread or general die, it will be some time before value is struck, I will admit that. I can be tenacious if nothing else.

62428130
>>62425890
emperorBTC's telegram has a basic bitch tldr set of material to learn from. also has a youtube where he goes over stuff. that's where I started and I like that he focuses on the absolute basics, although he leans heavily towards confirmation w/ volume which others may disagree with. btc focused but btc/crypto is perhaps the most effective use of TA.
basically there's no need to get fancy and the chart is the final source of truth because what the price does > what people cope and/or seethe about
support/resistance levels and price action with risk management (defined r:r) = compound as you get gud
once you commit you'll realize "the catch" on people actually make money from trading is is simply how retarded the overwhelming majority of people are that they simply cannot manage a few simple tenets to click buttons and make money, you likely being one of them if you don't develop a process and risk too much on trades
gl anon

62428141
>>62428130
also perps have exploded so trading equities for crypto natives has been a pleasure to avoid tradfi gatekeeping bs
follow the right people on twatter with alerts set to on and it's like having multiple research firms giving alpha for free-- key word "right" accounts. hopefully you have the pattern recognition to figure out which are spewing paid channel larps and which are providing genuine insight
that's basically the whole game. if you can get into a group chat with other chads that's even better because a network is stronger than you alone, although this is def an arena where it ultimately comes down to you mastering yourself (you can't copy trade your way to wealth but you can learn what others do/how they enter/exit positions)
legend trade is a new perps platform that's gamifying this if you wanna start there instead of hyperliquid (front-end using hyperliquid)
Also bigtrout300 on twitter and join his tg as well he's pretty dope. There's a lot of great accounts posting good shit right now. Some really good posters fade in/out of cycles while the scammers/extractors are always abundant, but just use discretion

62428170
>pic related
>"...focus on the chart as these information is very likely to be priced in already"
the "TA is astrology for men" line is used to make fun of retards who take it too far and treat it like divination when in reality it's all stacking probabilities/confluence in your favor as best you can, and from the above example you can see relying on your feed for information will almost always be slower than the chart

62428488
Finally some good posts

62428503
>>62428141
Big trout doesn't post on Twitter and his TG hasn't had activity since May. Any other suggestions?

62428780
>>62428503
His tg is BigTroutTrade and he posts on twitter all the time wdym

62428797
>>62428780
BigTrout Trading on youtube as well

other X goats that have been killing it IMO recently:
@MoneyPrinter0x
and my personal favorite currently:
@Wild_Randomness

there's tons of alpha just follow those people, then see what they repost, then follow the people they interact with that provide research, and even or especially follow the chinese/korean/japanese accounts that post comprehensive semiconductor/other market effort posts since translation is seamless now
never been a better time to go full NEET

62429207
>>62428797
But you're still under $10k?

62429246
>>62378965
Anon Belgium is literally doing very well in the world cup, you should make more of these predictions

62431586
bump.

62431599
probably nothing
bio protocol desci ai BIO now cookin with open ai, nvidia, anthropic, claude news check twita

62432055
>>62373752
Hey
I just started out in this crypto thing and bought $450 worth of solana. How do I become cool and multiply it

62432088
>>62432055
Be like me and listen to people within a group of other retards that are pushing a token. The last one tanked a $200 investment -98% but then he re-deployed the same token and it yielded a 40x from where it was called.

62432306
>>62432088
pardon my incompetence but I didn't understand much of what you just wrote anon

62432350
>>62428797
I had bad experiences following twitter people and waiting for signals even those that seem smart. It can be interesting but you’ll be lost if they randomly stop posting, they’re not funds giving you alpha but people that should have better things to do than post if their full job is actually trading.

I do still like @donalt and @cryptocred their show technical roundup is a rare non clickbaity show that just focuses on TA but most people are inherently frauds on social media

62432360
>>62432055
I don’t think Solana is a good buy right now it’s barely holding support and likely going lower to like 40 if I remember correctly

>>62432088
If you have a group like that be a hero to the community and share it to us

62432373
>>62432360
>be a hero to the community and share it to us
see
>>62385756
I recently held an airdrop for /biz/ too

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/62424715

62434369
Bump, I'm getting an early weekend because of the country's birthday. Will devote time to this thread.

62435112
>>62432350
skill issue. donalt? lol
you gotta follow the small accounts anon

62436077
>>62435112
Why would you rely on random accounts calls and not build the skill yourself? You are just fucked if you only listen to others, and you have no way to know they aren’t just lucky for a while until they drag you down with themselves

>donalt
Yes he may be old and washed but you can still learn a lot from two traders that never shilled some memecoin. Except for ftx but I guess everyone had an ftx sponsorship for a while

62436265
>UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD
>200 REPLIES

LMAOOOOOOOOOOOOOO OH NO NO NO NO AAAAAAAHHHHHH

item.title: I don't even know what my job is anymore. — 14 replies — 17.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
I don't even know what my job is anymore.

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-07-02 03:46 UTC

OP

>Be me
>29
>worked at company for 4 years
>Started off in IT operations
>After 2 years reorg changed my role into a service management analyst
>Doesn't really make sense but it will soon
>"trust me bro" - manager (who's empire is collapsing)
>doesn't work
>2 years later new department director
>Knows it's all BS and disempowers us to even do it
>Now I have nothing to do at all
>Now my manager scrambles for new work for us to do
>Just comes up with new thing
>Basically he's trying to justify his own existence because he's down to 5 staff, which is the minimum needed at this company

I'm extremely demoralised. Has this happened to anyone else? I don't even know what job I can get elsewhere because I've spent so long at this retarded company doing fake work hoping it would start to make sense and it never does

Early replies (first 3)

62436031
>>62436009
I work in a factory, with no AC, lost all of my overtime and my shift has gone from 18 workers down to 7 (other 11 were laid-off or fired).

62436037
>>62436031
Rough.

62436040
>>62436009
get out right fucking now if you know what's good for you

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62436055
if you haven't achieved a significant promotion (at least 40-50% salary increase) within 1-2 years of starting an entry level role (judging by the title this is an entry level role or close to it), you have been relegated to entry level hell and your salary adjusted for inflation will forever match what it was when you started, no matter how many lateral "promotions" they give you, until you're fired

speaking from experience as someone who has been promoted 4 times since starting an entry level role in 2020 and now managing the seniors that originally interviewed me

62436088
>>62436009
ive seen this many times in corporate offices. this is why you change companies every 3 years max. not only for the salary increase, but the skill increase. using your instance for example. imagine day 1 you are dropped into a new company and they ask you to partition and encrypt a drive. on paper you have 4 years of experience. but could you do it?

62436120
>>62436037
Oh, but my point in that response was, I've been doing the same factory wagie job for 15 years. Anytime I look at other jobs, they all pay less. Some even require a degree and pay less.

I haven't gained any news skills (except economic, finance, psychology and philosophy education from listening to podcasts and reading for 8 - 12 hours a day, 5 days a week), which are useless at acquiring a job. I've been offered higher roles, but the pay is shit. They offered me.a 50 cent raise to become the shift manager. I laughed in their faces.

62436629
>>62436055
Doesn't apply to me

>>62436040
Why? If they want to make me redundant they'd likely have to pay me about £20K because of the way my corporation is, and unions and employment legislation

>>62436088
Nope, I basically have no skills. Wasted my time here. You're right.

62436643
>>62436629
>brit
You should still apply for better jobs. Eventually your job will close your department and find a reason to fire you legally. The longer you wait the worse it will be.
I recommend moving to the USA economic zone.

62436759
>>62436629
you and your management chain are both useless. your skills are atrophying and you'll be let go inevitably, whether by being fired or laid off. at that point you won't have a job while you try to find the next job which makes it infinitely harder and more stressful

62437195
>>62436031
I worked at a warehouse with no AC just huge cattle fans in the summer. They would prop the doors open and blow the hot air in. On the hottest day the fuckhead manager would make gatorade. The boss/managers/whore secretaries would sit in the offices all day on those hot ones never coming out to the floor.

62437377
>>62437195
Ours do the same thing.

In our meeting they were like. We know it's 95 degrees in the factory and the dew point is 73, so we're giving you guys an extra 5 minutes of break time to cool off!

No, I'll take breaks whenever I want, retard.

62437391
>>62437195
>>62437377
Oh, and someone was already taken away by an ambulance yesterday because they passed out from heat exhaustion.

62437394
>>62436629
Sounds like you're unironically in a position that is kept around solely for an incoming executive to look good by cutting staffing costs. Similar to those retarded women everyone makes fun of at tech companies that get laid off every 6-18 months. That's you right now. Enjoy getting paid for doing nothing for a while and buff up your portfolio/resume.

62437477
>>62436055
I got to 2 years promotion with good raise but I think I’m gonna change companies next move because these guys treat me like shit and have no respect for anyone. It’s still hard though I feel like getting a damn interview somewhere is just so hard to get.

item.title: >if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT — 32 replies — 15.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
>if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-07-02 02:31 UTC

OP

>if my 22 year old son is still living at home , I don’t him paying rent, I want him OUT

Early replies (first 3)

62433628
But saaaaaar isnt this normal in india and all civilized places? Only in the so called united states of america they kick their kids out

62433637
>>62433628
anything that isnt jewish is indian because.... because it just is, okay!!!!

62433641
All you need is a half million dollar down payment and you can get your mortgage payment down to $4,250 per month on your loan against a million dollar house. Then you can live in the desert on top of your neighbors with trees that will fall over during the first rains and slight breeze because they don't belong in a desert.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62433652
>>62433626
Why did he upgrade to such an ambitious microphone? Recording an album? Burning money for no reason?

62434021
>>62433626
how much of a shit job did you do raising your kid if you want them out so young?

62434079
>>62433641
I like how you're pretending that's a starter home on the internet naively thinking nobody will notice your bullshit.

62434100
>>62433641
he probably bought his son one of these, nevermind just covering the down payment on it

rich boomers like this are carrying their chlidren through life. he forgot to mention he paid the rent for his son to move out, then bought him a house.

62434109
>>62433626
>How to ensure you get the niggerest “carers” in the cheapest nursing home and none of your children visit

62435117
>>62433626
I'm still at home and paying rent to my parents at 28. There's no reason to move out. I saved up 100k on my measly 63k/year wage since I started to work 3 years ago and made 10k from that on the market. Only retarded, lead poisoned scum kick their children out if there's nothing wrong with them. It's the most obvious psyop out there meant to please narcissistic boomers and force young people into debt.

62435187
Boomers want to legalize thousandth trimester abortions.

62435219
>>62435187
Nothing wrong with that if the baby is brown

62435449
>>62434079
starter homes are a retarded meme anyway

62435510
>>62434100
He paid for all his children's college tuition and housing. He's admitted in on his show. All the "advice" he gives is contrary to everything he's done himself to get ahead

62435715
>>62435510
how is not getting his kids into debt contrary to his advice of not getting into debt?

62435721
>>62433626
My parents supported me until I was 28. Now I’m a cpa making $150k and own a house and have 3 kids. Who knows where I’d be if they kicked me out at 22. Probably dead.

62435864
>>62435721
Well my family is rich but I was kicked out at 17 when I graduated early and I refused to pay rent(they wanted the going rate in my CA city)
My filling fell out 3 weeks ago and I need a root canal. But I just became a dad so all my money goes toward that. My first kid died a few years ago so, I am trying to be optimistic. I am 34

62435880
>>62433626
>I don’t him paying rent

62435903
>>62434079
(((starter homes))) are a made up buzz phrase to psyop people into reading lying jewish news articles about (((real estate))) and the (((housing market)))

62435925
>>62433626
Normal or rich people don’t do this. A 22 year old is like 1-2 year college.

62436306
>>62435715
his repeatedly told callers that their adult children shouldn't be living with them and that they should be paying rent. He didn't charge his kids rent

62436453
>>62433652
you seen it here first folks, newest rapper on the block dropping the heat

62436581
>>62435510
Boomers, and some older GenX (like Dave), really are out of touch when it comes to the importance of parental assistance.
The era of bootstrap-pulling is long over, and any mildly observant millennial or zoomer has probably noticed by now that their successful peers almost always got help (and a lot of it) from mom and dad.
And it's never been easier to notice this, given how over-exposed people are, thanks to social media, wikip etc.

62436586
>>62435864
Your family can’t be that rich. There’s just no way they’d kick you out at 17 if they were. It’s just not something actually rich people do.

62436615
>>62436306
his callers arent financially stable people whose lives are going well lmao

62436749
>>62435864
>filling fell out
>>62435864
>need a root canal
>>62435864
>first kid died
>>62435864
>optimistic
nigga brush your teeth and put down the meth pipe

62436842
>>62436586
Get a job you little brat.

62436889
>>62436581
My uncle offered to help me get a job and then never called me back. My mom completely refused to help me because "nepotism". Boomers ruined my life.
>get a lot of it
I knew a girl who was whining she couldn't afford rent because she divorced her black husband for beating her, then talked about how her parents gave her 'only' 100k for a downpayment on a house.

Lol.

62436891
>>62436306
He literally gave all his kids from different marriages manager jobs at his company.

>>62436615
So they should make their kids' lives shitty too?

62436914
>>62436581
>The era of bootstrap-pulling is long over
It isn't, no matter how hard your lazy entitled ass wishes it were.

62436916
>>62436889
>My uncle offered to help me get a job and then never called me back.
So why didn't you call him back? Show a little initiative for once in your life.

62437070
>>62436889
>”WAAAAHHHH MOMMY HELP ME HELP ME MOMMY!!!”
Lmao I always feel like such a chad when I come to this site.

62437244
>>62436914
>>62436916
>>62437070

item.title: You will love long enough to see Japan turn into a brothel for wealthy americans/westerners... — 75 replies — 13.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
You will love long enough to see Japan turn into a brothel for wealthy americans/westerners...

Open thread • Replies: 75 • Updated: 2026-07-01 23:03 UTC

OP

You will love long enough to see Japan turn into a brothel for wealthy americans/westerners...

Uhhh maybe the future isn't so bad at all, I like JP girls.

Early replies (first 3)

62431882
Its already like that. Kind of offputting really.

62431889
>>62431877
Should I have learned Japanese instead of Spanish?
I guess Japanese are more fake and xenophobic compared to Hispanics.

62431901
>>62431889
who gives a shit, you got money. That the point.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62432758
>>62432755
yes, I used to feel pain from cheating too

if you have enough sex you stop caring about women and it doesn't hurt if she cheats

maybe it's jaded.
but no woman is worth feeling bad over. Even the really pretty ones and really nice ones are still whores that cheat. Just like men.

62432768
>>62431877
I just want to find one who will donate eggs so I can have a whole herd of japa-hapa babies via IVF/surrogates.

62432769
>>62432755
also it's just sex

I know you feel love from sex but it's just sex

some other guy's dick doesn't change love just like you fucking some other girl's pussy won't change your love.

jealousy is about owning someone, and that's not love.

62432788
>>62432769
That is the nature intended outcome, we just leverage on it not going against it like what the society has mislead us into, you know getting betraying the entire life make a person fuming flame deep inside them to a point they willing to cross the line to do anything to another person. Say get into heavy debt due to cheating.

62432792
>>62432788
I made my first million dollars to spite my ex

I made my second third and fourth million dollars to spite my ex

take that rage and channel it into useful revenge

62432795
>>62432792
>take that rage and channel it into useful revenge
but be aware, when you get your revenge it won't satisfy. There's no pussy deep enough to bury your hate, and there's no money big enough to buy back your innocence

62432797
>>62432717
>I can pay for sex any time I want. Last time I went to Cabo I had whores lined up to hug me at the all-inclusive resort club.
>the fact is I don't have to pay, your gf's and wives and sisters and mothers are lining up to have sex with me.

62432801
>>62432795
wounded men can do great and terrible things

but that doesn't fix us. It's just a stone in the path

ultimately you lose the ability to love and you will miss it

62432803
>>62432792
There is plenty of romance but their man can only dream of, and the best part is they are free of charge, it is given to another man with no string attached. Beat me.

62432808
>>62432797
I'm much older than that and my chin is much bigger.

here you go, this is me

62432819
>>62431977
>Mexicans get mad at you for speaking Spanish
Is this true

62432863
>>62432819
Sí, porque se te da fatal su jerga ala verga

62432884
>>62432808
>322

where are you in that pic?

62432891
>>62431911
You are a gaijin though? And no japanese people dont see you differently youre still a baka gaijin to them

62432895
>>62432884
I'm the wrinkly viejo pon the lef han side

62432900
>>62432863
Then dont speak English, you're terrible at it

62432904
>>62432900
I'm a native born english speaker with a linguistic IQ of 162.

I speak 5 languages fluently, Neuvo is one of them.

62432907
>>62432904

62432915
>>62432907
just looking for my homies

yos chollos no publican

62432919
>>62431911
those cockasians always ruin everything, sticking their albino neanderthal monkey paws all over everything and fuck it. can't stand them sucking up all the clean air and contaminating everything, giving everyone std's and small pox

62432924
>>62432919
weird how we never had a medium pox

62432925
>>62432915
グーグルが大便利ですね!

62432939
>>62432925
you got me there

only moon runes I know are these

和楽器バンド / 千本桜

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K_xTet06SUo

62433118
>>62432904
162 IQ, okay what's your net worth?

62433235
>>62431877
Never heard of the homeless girls in Tokyo?

62433263
>>62432722
>it only takes me about 3 minutes to cum
a premature ejaculator who like the smell of his own farts kek

62433266
>>62431877
Party is over. Gaijins are being kicked out.

62436502
crazy that the waifus are getting fucked down by Chinese uncs with big bellies for ez entertainment

62436587
>>62431977
>The moment you start speaking nekkie tongue they get flabbergasted and clap
Nonsense. They continue to treat you like a toddler and ignore any Japanese word that you speak.

62436641
>>62431877
Nothing ever happens. They will be fine. We will get more anime that way.
